titleStmt.title: SII 9.592: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 592. (A.R. No. 22 of 1910.) ON A SLAB SET UP TO THE EAST OF THE BASAVESVARA TEMPLE AT KUNTHURU, KOLLEGAL TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: The record is damaged and dated Śaka 14[61], • • • Śrāvaṇa, śu. 2, Guruvāra, corresponding to A.D. 1539 July 17 Thursday in the reign of Achyuta-Mahārāya. It records the gift of certain incomes from the village Kuntūru belonging to Sālūra-Naṁjeyadēva made by Rāmābhaṭṭayya, an officer of the king. The gift was made for his own merit in the presence of the god Virūpākshadēva at Paṁpākshētra.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namaḥ svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīvi
jayābhyudayaśālivāhanasakavaruṣa
1461 saṁda varttamāna saṁvatsarada srāva
ṇa su 2 guruvāradalu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara śrīvī
ra Acyutamahārāyaru prutvīrājyaṁgeyiUttiralu
Avara bhujabhalapratāpa rāmabhaṭṭayyanavaru kuṁ
tūra siṁhāsanada dēvā pruthvīya mahāmahattinoḷagā
gi sālūra naṁjeyadēvaṁgaḷige sarvamā(ṁ)nyavāgi naḍadubaha
kuṁtūrali telugā(ṁ)ṇyavāda Aparadalli saṁbaḷa sarati
30 varahaṁnu tekkoṁḍu baruttiralāgi Ā sālūra naṁ
jedēvaru rāmābhaṭṭayyanavarige Āśīrvādava mā
ḍalāgi Ā saṁbaḷa sarati kāṇike bēḍige varu birāḍa Āvu
dū yillaveṁdu sarvamā(ṁ)nyavāgi paṁpākṣētrada virūpā
kṣadēvara saṁnidhiyali dharmārthavāgi tamage pu(ṁ)ṇyavāgale
ṁdu dhāreyaneradu koṭṭa silāsādhana . śrī . svada
ttāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasundharā[ṁ .*] ṣaṣṭivaruṣasahasrā
ṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi[ḥ .*] �yo dharmmakke Āvanānu
Aḷupidare gaṁgeya taḍiyali kapileya koṁda pāpake
hōharū .
Digital edition of SII 9.592 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
